meta.title: Logo exploration for Antes
meta.anchor: iOS app that turns screen-time blocks into positive rituals before distracting apps unlock
meta.summary: Premium, calm and intentional identity for a digital wellbeing app.

preserve: Portuguese positioning: Foco primeiro. Apps depois.
category: digital wellbeing, focus, habits, screen-time blocking
premium but approachable iOS product feel
avoid: partner logos or real app store badges
AI-generated wordmark text as final production artwork

routes.label: Threshold Mark
routes.rationale: A simple threshold shape signals the moment before opening an app.
routes.best_for: A premium app icon that feels calm and product-led.
routes.decision_advice: Use if the brand should own the idea of pausing at the doorway before distraction.
routes.watch_out: Keep the mark simple enough to survive at small icon sizes.
routes.next_step: Vectorize the threshold shape and test light/dark icon backgrounds.

routes.label: Ritual Unlock
routes.rationale: Connects the completed habit to temporary app access.
routes.decision_advice: Use if the icon should communicate unlock-after-action more directly.
routes.watch_out: Avoid looking like a generic password manager or security app.
routes.next_step: Refine the unlock gesture without relying on a literal lock.

routes.label: Pause To Focus
routes.rationale: A pause mark becoming movement captures 'before apps' in one gesture.
routes.best_for: A strong small-size symbol with motion.
routes.decision_advice: Use if the identity should feel crisp, modern and highly recognizable.
routes.watch_out: Too much arrow language may feel productivity-generic.
routes.next_step: Simplify the mark into a two-shape vector.

routes.label: Habit Spark
routes.rationale: Adds a controlled AI/wellness cue without making the product feel gimmicky.
routes.best_for: Showing rituais com IA while keeping a premium tone.
routes.decision_advice: Use if AI personalization should be visible in the brand system.
routes.watch_out: Sparkles can become generic if overused.
routes.next_step: Build one restrained sparkle motif for AI moments only.

routes.label: Calm Shield
routes.rationale: Signals protection without a harsh parental-control tone.
routes.best_for: Trust, safety, and Screen Time permission contexts.
routes.decision_advice: Use if the app needs to feel more protective than expressive.
routes.watch_out: May drift toward antivirus or security branding.
routes.next_step: Soften the shield into a rounded attention-protection mark.

routes.label: Intent Loop
routes.rationale: Shows interruption of habit loops in a friendly, reusable system.
routes.best_for: A flexible identity that can animate through product states.
routes.decision_advice: Use if the brand system should extend into streak/progress motion.
routes.watch_out: Loops can read as generic habit trackers unless tied to the threshold idea.
routes.next_step: Animate the pause point as a product micro-interaction.
